name: Coliseum Acquisition Corp. Warrant
summary: Coliseum Acquisition Corp. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share of the company. Coliseum Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is based in New York, NY.
